name: motion-text-effect
title: Text Effect
author: Motion Primitives
description: Reveals text by line, word, or character with configurable variants.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Rendered the final semantic text without segmentation or animation when reduced motion is requested.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import and added a final-text reduced-motion branch.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper and keep the phrase immediately readable as one semantic text node.
